raw_input:
[5.0/5] Anti Aging Serum - The Best Hyaluronic Acid Face Cream Moisturizer [[ASIN:B01699WMHO Anti Aging Serum - The Best Hyaluronic Acid Face Cream Moisturizer for Anti Wrinkle & Skin Tightening Night Cream. Tempt by Cazbe Skin Care Products Rejuvenate your youthful glow]]

I am always looking for something that will help me turn back the hands of time. I want to look good for as long as I can and because of that I've often used Vitamin C serums. I know they are effective and help with aging skin a lot, My skin has always been a challenge. I have oily skin with large pores and sometimes have uneven and dull skin. I also have some expression lines on my forehead. I wanted to start using this serum as soon as I got it home. The serum comes in a very nice bottle which I like a lot because not only is it pretty but the serum is delivered in an airless pump which distributes exactly the right amount of serum to my fingertips for easy application to my face. Since Vitamin C products are easily oxidized I appreciate the product being dispensed this way so that it protects the serum and keeps it effective. I have been using this serum the morning on cleansed skin after toner, and then again at night before moisturizer on clean skin in the same way. The serum has a nice scent that is not overpowering and it only takes a pump or two of the serum to cover my entire face. The serum doesn't feel greasy or oily and it's just the right consistency to spread easily. There was no burning or irritation with this product, and it absorbs well into my skin with no left over residue. My skin feels smooth, silky and refreshed after I apply this serum as if my face has a refreshing blast of moisture. It looks supple and moisturized for hours and I've noticed my makeup stays on better. I have been using the serum for about two weeks now. Since then I have noticed a lot of amount of improvement in the tone and smoothness of my skin. It doesn't look as dull and my skin also looks firmer. My skin is more radiant and soft and the expression lines in my forehead appear a little softer and the improved clarity of my skin is noticeable. My skin also looks better when I'm not wearing makeup. My skin has improved a little and I've been asked what had I been doing to make my skin look better? That makes me feel more confident that the serum is working. I am going to continue to use this serum and consider it a good value worth every penny of the asking price here since a little goes a long way. [4.0/5] enjoying this - great in tandem with a thick skin cream My mother asked me to find her a moisturizer with matrixxyl and peptides. Very specific and she didn’t want anything that did not have at least those two ingredients.

The reason is a conversation with her dermatologist. Matrixxyl is made of 2 peptides, palmitoyl-tripeptide and palmitoyl-oligopeptide, which stimulate collagen and elastin production in the skin. And peptides form a long chain of amino acids to become proteins, penetrating the top layer of skin cells and signaling the cells including collagen.

The Cazbe serum works really nicely in tandem with my mom’s Ponds cream (she has used Ponds as long as I remember). The serum absorbs pretty rapidly and unlike other serums, doesn’t seem to leave her skin feeling sort of ‘tight’ or dry. After a few minutes (she will put the serum on before brushing her teeth, and then follow with moisturizer after teeth), she will apply the Ponds cream to completely moisturize her face. I’ve tried this a few times and find I can only really use it around my eyes – it dries out my cheeks and chin. If used just around my eyes, it feels a lot better.

Her skin is looking beautiful. I think in combination with a really solid cream to sort of ‘seal in’ the benefits, after washing your face, and just before bed, it’s a great part of your beauty routine.

* we received the serum for evaluation and review [2.0/5] Not so sure. This product leaves the skin soft enough and feels nice but my concern is more about ingredients. I like to see my skin care's first ingredients be more like the heavy hitters like glycolic or lactic or even natural like aloe so I was disappointed regarding this one's contents. First is water and second is witch hazel. Which I likr, but three and four are glycerol stearate and peg-100 stearate. Peg 100 is a mixed bag of reviews and some even question the safety of it regarding get use in skin care. It's disappointing because it leaves my skin feeling amazing but I do like more natural ingredients for the first couple ingredients than this product has. [2.0/5] Didn't work for me I did not like this moisturizer it felt more like a serum and make my face feel tight and uncomfortable. It has peppermint oil in it as well and didn't mind the original tingle. It went on cool and nice, but it always tried and made my face feel tight. I always had to follow it with another moisturizer. I wasn't wild about the smell, it had a strong denatured alcohol smell to it. I couldn't tell any difference in my skin. [4.0/5] I like the pump I like the pump-- it's always easier to apply these things with a pump. I don't like the long list of chemical ingredients. I wish it had more organic natural things in it. It's also not as thick as I thought it would be. It is a little minty scented probably from the peppermint oil. It does apply nicely and isn't sticky. Also my skin feels very moisturized. I haven't been using it long enough to see a difference in my wrinkles though. I use it on my face and neck and also on the backs of my hands. I was offered this moisturizer at a reduced price so I could try it out and then review it. Thanks! [4.0/5] Great for nighttime! I love this serum as it makes my face feel and look refreshed in the morning! No oiliness or irritation! [5.0/5] So Soft! This mosturizer is great. It arrived on time and packaged nicely. I use it in the morning and at night before bedtime. I love the way my skin feels after I use it. It's so soft. I'm happy that it's made for all skin types because I have sensitive skin. I can also apply my makeup over the mosturizer without any problems. It works great. It would also make a great gift. I would recommend this product. I received a discount for my review. [1.0/5] One Star ist crap [5.0/5] Five Stars Very good product. [5.0/5] I love the way it makes my face feel and look I love the way it makes my face feel and look. I love that it is "A multi tasking Vitamin C Cream with Hyaluronic Acid that delivers brightness and youthful looking skin.:. Very smart product, works great, makes a difference. Someone at work actually noticed a change in my skin without me saying anything. [5.0/5] Very pleased with this anti aging serum! Recommended! This product review is for Anti Aging Serum - The Best Hyaluronic Acid Face Cream Moisturizer for Anti Wrinkle & Skin Tightening Night Cream. Tempt by Cazbe Skin Care Products Rejuvenate your youthful glow.
My wife bought this and this is her review: This is a great serum and I really love it. It smells nice and clean and isn't to thick. I use two pumps of this in the morning and two pumps at night. This amount covers my entire face and my neck area with no problem. I have been using this for two weeks now and have noticed results. Now my skin looks even toned and feels so much softer than before. My skin has no patches of dryness now, which it did before and I notice I have no red spots either. So I know this serum is working for me, therefore I highly recommend this. Most serums I have used before are clear and this one is white, so it kind of feels like a mix between a serum and a moisturizer. It spreads a long way so I expect this bottle to last me two months or so. For the price this is great if it does last two months so that makes me happy. I incorporated this into my daily routine with no problems and no issues of skin irritation or anything for that matter. In the morning I apply this right under my makeup and it works really well as a primer this way. My makeup looks better and last longer throughout the day. At night I put a moisturizer over this and again it works well for me. When I wake up my skin feels so soft and I am pleased with that.
Please note that I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. [5.0/5] Five Stars That product helps....Using it for 3 weeks now and I'm impressed

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, most reviewers are happy with this anti-aging serum. The majority praise how it makes their skin feel soft, smooth, and moisturized. Several reviewers noted visible improvements in skin tone, firmness, and the appearance of fine lines after using it for a couple of weeks. Many liked the airless pump design, which makes application easy and helps preserve the Vitamin C formula. Reviewers also appreciated that it works well under makeup and can be used on the face, neck, and hands.

A few reviewers had concerns. Two gave it 2 out of 5 stars, with one disliking the ingredient list, specifically calling out PEG-100 stearate as a questionable ingredient, and another finding the scent of denatured alcohol too strong and the peppermint oil causing a tight, uncomfortable feeling on the skin. Some reviewers wished the product used more natural and organic ingredients.

A small number of reviews were very brief and unhelpful, with one simply calling it "crap" and another just saying "good product."

On the positive side, multiple reviewers mentioned they received the product at a discount in exchange for a review, which is worth noting when considering the overall rating. Those who liked it tended to describe it as a good value and said they would continue using it and recommend it to others.
